commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: St. Jerome thinks Alexander and Rufus were disciples of Christ, and on this account the name of their father is here expressed (St. Jerome in Dionysius)

commentaries.author: John Chrysostom
commentaries.content: When they went out of the Praetorium, Christ was carrying it: but as they proceeded Simon took it from him and bore it.

commentaries.author: Tertullian of Carthage
commentaries.content: But by the above-named Abraxas; and to have come in a phantasm, and been destitute of the substance of flesh: that it was not He who suffered among the Jews, but that Simon

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
